playbook.intent: Turn a missed launch into a clean shutdown plus a sharper next-bet plan: refund/migrate users, harvest learnings publicly, recycle assets, decide on rebuild vs pivot vs walk away.
playbook.scope: Turn a missed launch into a clean shutdown plus a sharper next-bet plan: refund/migrate users, harvest learnings publicly, recycle assets, decide on rebuild vs pivot vs walk away.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Honest debrief

tasks.task: Capture what worked, what failed, what surprised

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the cause is named, not vibed.

stage.name: Customer + community comms
stage.intent: Protect trust with everyone who showed up.

tasks.task: Send personal emails to paying customers

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every paying customer has a personal touch.

stage.name: Asset harvest

tasks.task: Move keepers to a next-bet folder

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every asset has a tag.

stage.name: Public learnings post
stage.intent: Turn the failure into audience compounding.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when post is live AND replied to.

stage.name: Decide rebuild vs pivot vs walk

tasks.task: Score against the indie kill criteria

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one path is named in writing.

stage.name: Plan the next move
stage.intent: Write a tight plan for whichever path won.

tasks.task: If rebuild: spec the new v1
If pivot: open the new-bet sprint
If walk: wind down hosting, close accounts

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when first week is scheduled.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content sunset-rebuild-from-a-failed-launch --format md, agent: faion get-content sunset-rebuild-from-a-failed-launch --format context, json: faion get-content sunset-rebuild-from-a-failed-launch --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
